Compute the units digit of $T^{2023}+(T-2)^{20}-(T+10)^{23}$.'], 'role': 'assistant', 'name': 'mathproxyagent'} {'content': ["To solve the problem of finding the units digit of the expression \\( T^{2023} + (T-2)^{20} - (T+10)^{23} \\) where \\( T = 7 \\), we'll use modular arithmetic, specifically modulus 10, to extract the units digit. Here's how we should proceed:", '', '1. Determine the units digit of \\( 7^{2023} \\).', '2. Determine the units digit of \\( 5^{20} \\) since \\( T-2 = 5 \\).', '3. Determine the units digit of \\( 17^{23} \\) since \\( T+10 = 17 \\).', '', 'For modular arithmetic, the units digit of a number \\( n \\) is simply \\( n \\mod 10 \\).', '', '### Step-by-step Solution', '', '#### 1. Units digit of \\( 7^{2023} \\)', 'The powers of 7 cycle through 4 different units digits:', '- \\( 7^1 = 7 \\) (units digit 7)', '- \\( 7^2 = 49 \\) (units digit 9)', '- \\( 7^3 = 343 \\) (units digit 3)', '- \\( 7^4 = 2401 \\) (units digit 1)', 'After \\( 7^4 \\), the cycle repeats.', '', 'So, we find \\( 2023 \\mod 4 \\) to determine which units digit is \\( 7^{2023} \\):', '\\[ 2023 \\mod 4 = 3 \\]', 'Thus, the units digit of \\( 7^{2023} \\) is the same as \\( 7^3 \\), which is 3.', '', '#### 2. Units digit of \\( 5^{20} \\)', 'Any power of 5 always has the units digit 5.', 'Thus, the units digit of \\( 5^{20} \\) is 5.', '', '#### 3. Units digit of \\( 17^{23} \\)', 'The powers of 17 cycle through 4 different units digits:', '- \\( 17^1 = 17 \\) (units digit 7)', '- \\( 17^2 = 289 \\) (units digit 9)', '- \\( 17^3 = 4913 \\) (units digit 3)', '- \\( 17^4 = 83521 \\) (units digit 1)', 'Similar to 7, the cycle repeats every 4 powers.', '', 'Again, find \\( 23 \\mod 4 \\):', '\\[ 23 \\mod 4 = 3 \\]', 'Thus, the units digit of \\( 17^{23} \\) is the same as \\( 17^3 \\), which is 3.', '', '### Final Calculation', '', 'Now we compute the expression modulo 10:', '\\[', '7^{2023} + 5^{20} - 17^{23} \\equiv 3 + 5 - 3 \\equiv 5 \\pmod{10}', '\\]', '', 'The units digit of the expression is \\(\\boxed{5}\\).'], 'role': 'user', 'name': 'assistant'}
